acceptance_targets: [chapter_12_f01] PASS if a read-through anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:45, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:69, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:155 shows each block introducing distinct function (facts, pressure response, decision) with no full repeated list of the same dates/amounts; FAIL if two blocks still present materially identical financial recitation.

[chapter_12_f02] PASS if revised text anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:119 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:121 shows the beat through at least two specific observable details in-scene and removes abstract de-escalation phrasing; FAIL if the passage still summarizes the moment as non-drama rather than depicting it.

[chapter_12_f03] PASS if, in the revised versions of snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:87, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:149, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:255, no more than one line still uses a negation-led correction pattern and each beat remains concrete; FAIL if two or more of those anchors keep the same negation-first architecture.

[chapter_12_f04] PASS if the revised chapter keeps Nora's lexicon at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:43 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:53 but replaces at least two later token repeats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:75, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:153, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:201 with fresh, scene-specific language while preserving meaning; FAIL if those later anchors still recycle the same token cluster verbatim.

[FBR-010] Pass if the revised cited lines preserve all concrete financial/legal information while removing slogan-like repetition of the same managerial token cluster and restoring distinct speaker texture. Fail if the passage still reads as interchangeable 'facts/dates/numbers/receipts' refrains.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if a read-through anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:45, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:69, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:155 shows each block introducing distinct function (facts, pressure response, decision) with no full repeated list of the same dates/amounts; FAIL if two blocks still present materially identical financial recitation.
findings.problem: Core financial facts are restated in three consecutive blocks (voicemail, Eli recap, repayment draft) with limited new dramatic leverage, so the chapter stalls in information loop before the behavioral turn fully lands.
findings.rewrite_direction: Compress one of the recap blocks and convert that space into consequential action beats. Keep the full fact set in the voicemail at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:45 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:53, trim Eli's desk recap at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:69 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:75 to only what Marisol challenges, and let the plan block at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:155 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:173 carry only decisions not already spoken verbatim.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised text anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:119 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:121 shows the beat through at least two specific observable details in-scene and removes abstract de-escalation phrasing; FAIL if the passage still summarizes the moment as non-drama rather than depicting it.
findings.problem: Timidity at a pressure point: narration steps back into abstract framing ("There was no melodrama and no scene") instead of rendering the immediate emotional/physical aftershock, which defuses tension right after Marisol's boundary push.
findings.rewrite_direction: Replace the abstract reassurance line at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:121 with concrete in-room consequence tied to Eli's body and attention (breath, posture, tactile detail, failed response), while preserving Marisol's unsentimental boundary at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:119.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, in the revised versions of snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:87, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:149, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:255, no more than one line still uses a negation-led correction pattern and each beat remains concrete; FAIL if two or more of those anchors keep the same negation-first architecture.
findings.problem: Recurring negation-first sentence template ("not because... but because..." / "not from...") appears more than twice, becoming a visible prose tic that flattens cadence and makes emotional claims feel pre-argued.
findings.rewrite_direction: Recast the targeted lines at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:87, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:149, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:255 into varied affirmative constructions that state motive/consequence directly without prefacing through negation.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised chapter keeps Nora's lexicon at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:43 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:53 but replaces at least two later token repeats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:75, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:153, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:201 with fresh, scene-specific language while preserving meaning; FAIL if those later anchors still recycle the same token cluster verbatim.
findings.problem: Mechanical lexical repetition around accountability tokens ("numbers, dates, facts, receipts") is over-literal and starts to read like style-profile checklist reuse instead of organic language variation.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep the motif but diversify diction outside Nora's voicemail. Retain token-heavy phrasing in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:43 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:53, then revise snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:75, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:153, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:201 to express accountability through concrete actions/objects rather than repeating the same abstract nouns.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised cited lines preserve all concrete financial/legal information while removing slogan-like repetition of the same managerial token cluster and restoring distinct speaker texture. Fail if the passage still reads as interchangeable 'facts/dates/numbers/receipts' refrains.
findings.problem: Style-bible token overfitting: managerial mantra diction ('numbers', 'dates', 'facts', 'no speeches') repeats across many chapters and starts to flatten voice. In this chapter, the recurrence is concentrated enough to feel sloganic.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise mantra-dense spans at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3901, snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3927, snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4013, and snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4039. Keep all deadlines/amounts, but vary diction and embed at least one character-specific sensory or relational cue per block so the scene reads as lived conflict, not repeated policy language.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into morally mixed behavior, bodily consequence, and economic detail when they are causally active. In edge cases, choose the more concrete and uncomfortable rendering unless it violates factual continuity; if two renderings are equally plausible, prefer the one that increases character accountability rather than reader reassurance.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene contains pain, sex, addiction, debt panic, or humiliation, abstract phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with embodied specificity.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for emphasis, legal precision, or deliberate emotional distance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate chapter architectures across the book: confrontation chapters, document-information turns, labor-process chapters, transit interiority chapters, and quiet relational chapters. Consecutive chapters must differ in scene density or dialogue-to-interiority ratio.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary American literary realism: precise, unsentimental, image-aware, and concrete under stress.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third-person anchored to Eli, with no unmarked POV drift.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Braided cadence: reflective medium-length sentences interrupted by blunt short lines at impact moments.
